site.name: Dumyat Public Hospital
site.tagline: A national beacon of public health excellence
site.description: A prestige showcase of Dumyat Public Hospital, celebrating its medical achievements, people, and public service.

hero.label: Public Health Pillar
hero.headline: A hospital built on service, science, and national pride
hero.subhead: For decades, Dumyat Public Hospital has carried Egypt’s mission of accessible, high-quality healthcare with unwavering dignity and compassion.

mission.missionBody: Deliver world-class care to every citizen with integrity and empathy.
mission.visionBody: Shape the future of public healthcare through innovation and trust.
mission.valuesBody: Excellence, transparency, and service to the Egyptian community.

achievements.title: Milestones of National Impact
achievements.subtitle: Each milestone represents a promise fulfilled for the people of Egypt.

departments.title: Departments of Care
departments.subtitle: Comprehensive specialties led by expert teams and modern facilities.

team.title: The Minds Behind Our Mission
team.subtitle: Leadership and clinical teams dedicated to public health leadership.

testimonials.title: Stories of Healing
testimonials.subtitle: Voices from patients and families who trusted our care.

items.quote: We found attentive, human care at every step.
items.name: Souad Ibrahim

items.quote: The staff were reassuring and exceptionally professional.
items.name: Mohamed Abdallah

items.quote: We felt in safe hands throughout the treatment journey.
items.name: Reem Sherif

news.title: News and Highlights
news.subtitle: Updates from the hospital, research, and community initiatives.

contact.title: Contact and Location
contact.subtitle: We are here to serve the nation, every hour of every day.

details.address: Dumyat - Nile Corniche - Sa'd Zaghloul St., in front of the Governorate Building
